documents: Nikola Tesla was born in Smiljan, a village in modern-day Croatia.
Zagreb is the capital city of Croatia.
Nikola Tesla invented the alternating current (AC) electrical system.
Alexander Fleming discovered Penicillin in 1928 at St. Mary's Hospital.
St. Mary's Hospital is located in London, England.
London is the capital of the United Kingdom.
Albert Einstein was born in Ulm, a city in Germany.
Berlin is the capital of Germany.
Albert Einstein developed the Theory of General Relativity.
The Theory of General Relativity predicted the existence of gravitational waves.
Gravitational waves were first detected by the LIGO observatory in 2015.
Marie Curie discovered the radioactive elements Polonium and Radium.
Marie Curie was born in Warsaw, Poland.
Warsaw is the capital of Poland.
Radium is used in radiation therapy to treat certain types of cancer.
The Mona Lisa was painted by Leonardo da Vinci.
The Mona Lisa is displayed in the Louvre museum.
The Louvre museum is located in Paris, France.
Paris is the capital of France.
Leonardo da Vinci also painted The Last Supper.

questions.question: What is the capital of the country where Nikola Tesla was born?
questions.chain: Tesla -> born_in -> Smiljan -> part_of -> Croatia -> capital -> Zagreb

questions.question: In which city did the discoverer of Penicillin make his discovery?
questions.chain: Penicillin -> discovered_at -> St. Mary's Hospital -> located_in -> London

questions.question: What is the capital of the country where the developer of the Theory of General Relativity was born?
questions.chain: Theory of General Relativity -> developed_by -> Einstein -> born_in -> Ulm -> part_of -> Germany -> capital -> Berlin

questions.question: Which radioactive element discovered by the scientist born in Warsaw is used in cancer treatment?
questions.chain: Warsaw -> birthplace_of -> Marie Curie -> discovered -> Radium -> used_in -> cancer treatment

questions.question: In which country is the museum that displays the Mona Lisa located?
questions.chain: Mona Lisa -> displayed_in -> Louvre -> located_in -> Paris -> part_of -> France

questions.question: What phenomenon predicted by Einstein was first detected in 2015?
questions.chain: Einstein -> developed -> General Relativity -> predicted -> gravitational waves -> detected_in -> 2015

questions.question: Who painted the artwork displayed in the museum in the capital of France?
questions.chain: France -> capital -> Paris -> has_museum -> Louvre -> displays -> Mona Lisa -> painted_by -> Leonardo da Vinci

questions.question: What is the capital of the country where the antibiotic discovered by Fleming is named after?
questions.chain: Fleming -> discovered_at -> St. Mary's Hospital -> located_in -> London -> capital_of -> United Kingdom
